components.value: V, M (a bit of dried brain tissue)

description.value: You automatically detect and locate conscious creatures within 60 feet, as if you possessed the blindsight ability. Nondetection, mind blank, and similar effects can block this effect. Thoughtsense can distinguish between sentient ( Intelligence 3 or greater) and non-sentient ( Intelligence 1â2) creatures, but otherwise provides no information about the creatures it detects.
